codes.UNKNOWN_ERROR: Bir şeyler ters gitti. Please try again shortly.
codes.NETWORK_ERROR: We could not connect için server. Please check your internet connection ve try again.
codes.REQUEST_TIMEOUT: server took too long için respond. Please try again.
codes.BACKEND_HOST_UNREACHABLE: We could not reach server. Please check your internet connection ve try again.
codes.SECURE_CONNECTION_FAILED: Secure connection failed. Check backend HTTPS certificate.
codes.CONFLICT: This update conflicts ile newer saved clinical data
codes.VALIDATION_ERROR: Please check highlighted fields ve try again.
codes.SERVER_ERROR: Bir şeyler ters gitti while processing your request. Please try again shortly.
codes.BACKEND_UNAVAILABLE: We could not connect için server right now. Please try again shortly.
codes.BACKEND_ENDPOINT_NOT_FOUND: Backend API endpoint was not found. domain is reachable, but API route is not deployed.
codes.RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND: requested record could not be found. Please yenile ve try again.
codes.ADMISSION_NOT_FOUND: admission record could not be found. Please return için takip ve try again.
codes.BACKEND_METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED: Backend endpoint exists but does not accept this request.
codes.BACKEND_INVALID_RESPONSE: Backend returned an invalid sign-in response. It may be serving website instead of API.
codes.SESSION_STORAGE_FAILED: We could not kaydet your sign-in session. Please try again.
codes.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Wait a moment ve try again.
codes.ROUTE_ERROR: An hata occurred while Yükleniyor this page
codes.INVALID_CREDENTIALS: Invalid e-posta veya parola. Please check your details ve try again.
codes.MULTIPLE_TENANTS: Multiple tenants found. Please Seç a tenant.
codes.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session expired. Oturum aç again için devam et.
codes.USER_EXISTS: This e-posta is already registered. Please sign in instead.
codes.AI_UNAUTHORIZED: AI API key invalid veya expired
codes.HOME_SUMMARY_INVALID: Ana sayfa summary response is invalid
codes.ADMISSION_SAVE_FAILED: Kaydedilemiyor: admission record. Bağlantınızı kontrol edip tekrar deneyin
codes.ADMISSION_VALIDATION_FAILED: Some gerekli admission details are missing. Please İncele highlighted fields.
codes.ADMISSION_RECOMMENDATION_FAILED: Unable için generate clinical recommendations right now. You can still İncele ve kaydet admission.
codes.VENTILATION_SESSION_DRAFT_LOAD_FAILED: Yüklenemiyor: admission form. Bağlantınızı kontrol edip tekrar deneyin
codes.VENTILATION_SESSION_DRAFT_SAVE_FAILED: Kaydedilemiyor: local admission draft. Please try again

capture.governanceNotice: Captured candidates are submitted için reviewer approval only. Raw pasted notes are not stored in approved datasets veya sent için external model services.
capture.roleBlocked: Dataset candidate capture requires an approved clinical write rol.
capture.offlineNotice: Çevrimdışı submissions are kuyrukta ile structured fields only ve sync when connectivity returns.

capture.facilityMissing: Seç: veya sign in için one active tesis before submitting.

capture.identifierWarning: Identifier-like text was detected. It is not included in structured İncele payload.

privacy.title: Gizlilik
privacy.localStorageDescription: Preferences ve session data are stored only on this device. Yok:thing is sent için external servers.
privacy.optionalAI: If Çevrimiçi AI features are enabled, those requests may be sent için configured services.

about.title: Hakkında
about.prototypeScope: This is a prototype için reference ve training. Yok:t için clinical use.

safety.title: Clinical safety
safety.body: AI Vent provides documentation support ve advisory safety prompts only. It does not replace clinical judgment, issue treatment orders, veya determine Ventilatör ayarlar.
safety.secondary: Confirm all decisions against hasta, your tesis workflow, ve local clinical protocol.
safety.acknowledgeLabel: I understand this is advisory decision support only
safety.acknowledgeHint: Gerekli before continuing için clinical workflows
safety.syncDeferred: Safety acknowledgement is saved on this device ve will be senkronize edildi when backend authentication is available.

clinicalSafety.title: Use as advisory support
clinicalSafety.body: İncele safety note before using AI Vent. app can highlight missing data ve uncertainty, but a qualified clinician remains responsible için hasta care decisions.

facilityWorkflow.title: Stay in tesis context
facilityWorkflow.body: Use active tesis ve rol shown by your session. Keep records within correct tesis workflow ve follow local escalation, İncele, ve approval procedures.

inputs.title: Gir:ing inputs
inputs.body: Use Kabul et için gir: available clinical parameters (SpO2, PaO2, PaCO2, pH, respiratory rate, etc.). İsteğe bağlı ABG values improve confidence when available, but missing İsteğe bağlı data should be reviewed as uncertainty rather than treated as a kaydet blocker.

recommendations.title: Interpreting recommendations
recommendations.body: Recommendations Göster advisory Ventilatör setting references ile a confidence tier. Match quality reflects how well dataset cases align ile your inputs. Use matched cases as reference only ve verify against clinical judgment.

monitoring.title: İzleme ve alerts
monitoring.body: After reviewing a Öneri, use İzleme için log vitals ve labs over time. Alerts highlight values outside set thresholds ve should be assessed according için local protocol.

offline.title: Çevrimdışı behavior
offline.body: Core workflow (Kabul et, advisory summaries, İzleme) works Çevrimdışı. Data is saved locally. İsteğe bağlı AI features require connectivity. When geri Çevrimiçi, devam et as normal.

glossary.PEEP: Positive end-expiratory pressure (cmH₂O). Maintains lung volume ve oxygenation.
glossary.FiO2: Fraction of inspired oxygen (0–1). Percentage of oxygen in inspired gas.
glossary.IERatio: I:E ratio. Inspiratory için expiratory time ratio (e.g. 1:2).
glossary.tidalVolume: Tidal hacim (mL). Volume delivered per breath.
glossary.PaCO2: Partial pressure of arterial carbon dioxide (mmHg).
glossary.ABG: Arterial blood gas values such as PaO2, PaCO2, ve pH, tied için a sample time.
glossary.referenceStatus: Governance ve verification state için a reference range. Only active approved veya verified ranges are eligible için active decision-support display.
glossary.datasetCapture: Candidate de-identified records that need İncele before dataset veya training use.
glossary.reviewQueue: A work queue için İncele decisions, corrections, exclusions, ve audit reasons.
glossary.syncState: Current Çevrimdışı, Çevrimiçi, veya syncing state. Clinical records may still need later sync.
glossary.shadowMode: Governed model evaluation mode where outputs remain hidden den normal clinical workflows.

missingABG.title: Missing ABG values
missingABG.body: Recommendations work without ABG; gir: SpO₂ ve Diğer vitals when available. için better matching, ekle PaO₂, PaCO₂, ve pH when you have them.

offline.title: Using app Çevrimdışı
offline.body: Kabul et, advisory summaries, ve İzleme work Çevrimdışı. Data is stored locally. İsteğe bağlı AI suggestions require internet. Sync is not gerekli için core workflow.

unverifiedReference.title: Reference range is not active
unverifiedReference.body: Draft, beklemede, retired, rejected, ve unverified ranges are not eligible için active decision-support display. İncele source, version, scope, ve verification status.

roleRestrictedModelHelp.title: Model-readiness Yardım is restricted
roleRestrictedModelHelp.body: Predictive model readiness ve shadow-mode details are visible only için approved governance roles. Yok:rmal clinical workflows do not expose model internals.

needsReview.title: Record needs İncele
needsReview.body: Use İncele queue için check submitted data, request correction, onayla eligible records, veya Hariç tut records ile an audit neden.

guides.home: İncele tesis context, sync state, active admissions, red flags, ve records needing İncele before opening a hasta workflow.
guides.admit: Capture hasta pathway ve available clinical values. Mark unavailable data clearly ve İncele backend-confirmed calculations after kaydet.
guides.tracking: Use takip için scan recent ventilation status ve İncele needs. Read trend flags ile source data ve local protocol context.
guides.abgVentUpdate: Add new ABG results and ventilator settings as time-stamped records so earlier values remain available for review.
guides.datasetCapture: Use dataset capture için de-identified candidate records. Human İncele is gerekli before approved training-data use.
guides.reviewQueue: Use İncele queue için onayla, request correction, veya Hariç tut records while preserving audit trail.
guides.dashboard: Use dashboards için aggregate quality, İncele, reference, ve governance status. Avoid hasta identifiers in governance summaries.
guides.settings: Use ayarlar için hesap, tesis, accessibility, gizlilik, sync, ve reference visibility preferences where authorized.
guides.hypoxemia: İncele FiO₂ ve PEEP; consider recruitment; check için shunt veya V/Q mismatch.
guides.hypercapnia: İncele minute ventilation (rate × tidal volume); consider permissive hypercapnia per protocol.
guides.acidosis: Address ventilation ve perfusion; correct underlying cause per protocol.
guides.general: Use recommendations as decision support only. Validate against local protocols ve clinical judgment.

oxygenAbgVentilator.description: Record current oxygen support, observation time, oxygenation, vital signs, available ABG values, ve uncertain values. Ventilatör ayarlar are suggested on sonraki step den dataset.
oxygenAbgVentilator.oxygenSupportHint: Choose support hasta is receiving when these values are measured.

saveReview.description: İncele ve Düzenle dataset-suggested Ventilatör ayarlar, backend readiness, clinician confirmation, override neden when needed, İncele status, ve sync state.

observations.title: Additional observations
observations.description: Record any extra clinical data not covered above (e.g. labs, imaging, medications, comorbidity scores). Each observation is a single ad–value pair. İsteğe bağlı; you can skip this step.
observations.name: Ad

timeSeries.title: Time series (vital signs over time)
timeSeries.description: Track vital signs veya Diğer metrics at multiple time points (e.g. SpO₂, RR, HR at 0h, 1h, 2h). Used için trend analysis ve İzleme after you start session. İsteğe bağlı; you can ekle points later on İzleme screen.
